releaseNotes: Football streaming completely rebuilt — removed broken iptv-org M3U parser and fake fixture-ID URLs. Now constructs real embed page URLs using team names via streamed.su, crackstreams.biz, sportshub.stream, and others.
AnimePlayerScreen now powers football streams — WebView intercepts .m3u8 streams from sports aggregators using the same pipeline as movies and anime.
Match detail screen shows full score, teams, and league info — tap 'Find Live Stream' to get a playable embed.
Server continues improvements from v1.22 — null safety on Supabase, AniList, MangaDex, Wikidata; graceful port-in-use exit; hardened content search and home endpoints.
